ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., city, county, special district) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the entity */,
  "entity_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the entity */,
  "entity_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the entity */,
  "entity_website" TEXT /* Official website of the entity */,
  "entity_founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was founded */,
  "entity_population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity */,
  "entity_administrator" TEXT /* Name of the entity's administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year (e.g., 2019, 2020) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fiscal year (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustment_types" (
  "adjustment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment type */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., beginning fund balance, prior year entries) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the adjustment type (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the adjustment type is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity making the adjustment */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year for which the adjustment is made */,
  "adjustment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjustment type */,
  "adjustment_description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "date_of_adjustment" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was made */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the adjustment */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was approved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_adjustment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjustment_type_id") REFERENCES adjustment_types ("adjustment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "financial_statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity reporting the financial statement */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year for which the financial statement is reported */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement was reported */,
  "prepared_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who prepared the financial statement */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the financial statement */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial statement was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governmental_funds" (
  "governmental_fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governmental fund */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity reporting the governmental fund */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year for which the governmental fund is reported */,
  "fund_balance" REAL /* Fund balance */,
  "revenues" REAL /* Revenues */,
  "expenditures" REAL /* Expenditures */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of governmental fund (e.g., general, special) */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Description of the governmental fund */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the fund is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governmental_fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governmental_funds_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governmental_funds_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proprietary_funds" (
  "proprietary_fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proprietary fund */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity reporting the proprietary fund */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year for which the proprietary fund is reported */,
  "fund_balance" REAL /* Fund balance */,
  "revenues" REAL /* Revenues */,
  "expenditures" REAL /* Expenditures */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of proprietary fund (e.g., enterprise, internal service) */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Description of the proprietary fund */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the fund is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proprietary_fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proprietary_funds_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proprietary_funds_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, government official) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being audited */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change was made by an automated process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statement_versions" (
  "financial_statement_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement version */,
  "financial_statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial statement */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_statement_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statement_versions_financial_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("financial_statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governmental_fund_versions" (
  "governmental_fund_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governmental fund version */,
  "governmental_fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the governmental fund */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the governmental fund */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the governmental fund version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the governmental fund version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governmental_fund_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governmental_fund_versions_governmental_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("governmental_fund_id") REFERENCES governmental_funds ("governmental_fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proprietary_fund_versions" (
  "proprietary_fund_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proprietary fund version */,
  "proprietary_fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proprietary fund */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the proprietary fund */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the proprietary fund version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the proprietary fund version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proprietary_fund_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proprietary_fund_versions_proprietary_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("proprietary_fund_id") REFERENCES proprietary_funds ("proprietary_fund_id")
)
